failures.description: The Executor misread or ignored the catalog search result and answered that there were no matching items, despite the tool returning one matching item priced above the threshold.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal matched the user request and the required information was available after the ProductCatalogSearch result at index 3. The tool output clearly returned one available beginner Jigsaw Puzzle priced at 46.13, which is greater than 45.76. At index 4, the Executor synthesized the opposite answer, claiming no items match. This is not an invalid tool call or underspecification; it is a contradiction of the relevant tool output.
